message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first build_explain_context in ft robot search-explain (tick 269)

Migrates the `ft robot search-explain` dispatch in `frankenterm/main.rs`
to the cx-first sibling:

- L18104 call: `search_explain::build_explain_context(&storage, &query, pane)`
  → `build_explain_context_with_cx(&explain_cx, &storage, &query, pane)`
  where `explain_cx` resolves via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`

The `_with_cx` variant threads cx through the multi-query storage
pipeline that composes the explain context — pane list, indexing stats,
gap records, retention cleanup count, segment time range — all via
their respective `_with_cx` siblings with `cx.checkpoint()` at each
step.

Search-explain queries are the most storage-intensive read operation
in the robot mode CLI (6+ parallel storage queries per invocation), so
cx-cancel propagation is especially valuable here: an operator-cancellable
Cx during `ft robot search-explain` now aborts the explain build mid-stream
rather than running the full query chain before unwinding.

Legacy ambient `build_explain_context` retained in search_explain.rs
for test harnesses.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 83 (187-269).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 129 sites (128 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
